title: glochidion humile
intro: Glochidion humile, also known as the dwarf globe currant, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Glochidion humile include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Glochidion humile include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, roots, or bark.
